name: Yandex Mobile Ads

seo.title: Yandex Mobile Ads — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Yandex Mobile Ads: Yandex app monetization SDK for iOS and Android with banner, interstitial, native, and rewarded video formats.

when_to_use: Banner, interstitial, and rewarded video monetization for iOS/Android
Native ad format integration for Russian-market mobile apps
Supplementing AdMob revenue with Yandex demand for CIS markets

pros: Solid iOS and Android SDK quality
cons: Geopolitical risk around Russian ad tech
review.verdict: Only makes sense for CIS-focused apps, geopolitical and payment risks outweigh gains elsewhere.
review.best_for: Apps with significant Russian, Belarusian, or Central Asian audiences.
review.not_for: Western apps due to sanctions, compliance and payout complications.
